'''''Bouncer''''' was a [[IPV-1 System Patrol Craft|system patrol craft]] employed by [[Dunari]]. It was hired to protect his casino [[Dunari's Rest]]. It was on patrol when [[Ace Azzameen/Legends|Ace Azzameen]] and his brother [[Emon Azzameen|Emon]] went to the casino for a drink, only to be turned back after engaging with [[Viraxo]] ships within casino airspace. The ''Bouncer'' was not seen again after this.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]''
